positive: A whimsical forest grove scene illustration, central composition, featuring stylized geometric flora and fauna, including glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, friendly woodland foxes in mid-jump, and delicate hanging vines. The overall style should be a modern, clean linework vector art with a pop-art color palette: deep sapphire blues, mustard yellows, and forest greens, with stark white negative space for contrast. The composition must be highly repeatable and aesthetically pleasing when scaled onto clothing. Bright, even lighting; strong, saturated colors; minimalist graphic details. Suitable for seamless print placement.
